name: vetstappen-phase3
description: VetStappen - Veterinary Appointment Reservation System (Phase 3 build)

scripts.seed: node -e "require('./model/db').connectDB().then(() => require('./model/seed').seedDatabase()).then(() => { console.log('Seed finished.'); process.exit(0); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
